'''kavama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xuanhuan|xuanhuan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xuanhuan|xuanhuan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kavama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kævæmæth|kævæmæth]] || [[word:kævæmæj|kævæmæj]] || [[word:kævæmæsh|kævæmæsh]] || [[word:kævæmæ|kævæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavavamath|kavavamath]] || [[word:kavavamaj|kavavamaj]] || [[word:kavavamash|kavavamash]] || [[word:kavavama|kavavama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavamath|kavamath]] || [[word:kavamaj|kavamaj]] || [[word:kavamash|kavamash]] || [[word:kavama|kavama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavafmath|kavafmath]] || [[word:kavafmaj|kavafmaj]] || [[word:kavafmash|kavafmash]] || [[word:kavafmaf|kavafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavamatha|kavamatha]] || [[word:kavamaja|kavamaja]] || [[word:kavamasha|kavamasha]] || [[word:kavamaka|kavamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavamath|kavamath]] || [[word:kavamaj|kavamaj]] || [[word:kavamash|kavamash]] || [[word:kavama|kavama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavamathal|kavamathal]] || [[word:kavamajal|kavamajal]] || [[word:kavamashal|kavamashal]] || [[word:kavamakal|kavamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavamathatha|kavamathatha]] || [[word:kavamajaja|kavamajaja]] || [[word:kavamashasha|kavamashasha]] || [[word:kavamaka|kavamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavamathan|kavamathan]] || [[word:kavamajan|kavamajan]] || [[word:kavamashan|kavamashan]] || [[word:kavamakan|kavamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavamathaoro|kavamathaoro]] || [[word:kavamajaoro|kavamajaoro]] || [[word:kavamashaoro|kavamashaoro]] || [[word:kavamakaoro|kavamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
